message:
Add opt-in Windows e2e smoke test and bootstrap hooks

- introduce BootstrapOptions and run_app_with_options to seed/skip ingest and override pipe name

- add service feature flag e2e-windows with tempfile dev-dep

- implement ULTRASEARCH_E2E-gated named-pipe smoke test using temp indices and seeded FileMeta

- keep existing behavior default; test passes with env + feature
